privileged_info_summary: The dataset contains 6 synthetic loans with a total principal of $23,800,000, comprising 3 fixed-rate loans, 1 variable-rate loan, 1 balloon loan, and 1 interest-only loan. The task explicitly requires creating 9 new sheets: one for each of the 6 loans (LOAN-001 through LOAN-006), plus Portfolio_Summary, Covenant_Compliance, and Sensitivity_Analysis. Required features include PMT/IPMT/PPMT formulas, variable rate lookups, balloon payment calculations, DSCR covenant checks, sensitivity analysis, and conditional formatting.
